column1: # Title: Population-weighted HDDCDD historical data and projections for Hong Kong

# Source: Refer to Xiujuan He Hong Kong base temperatures for heating and cooling degree days (HDD and CDD) are 14.95°C and 20.66°C (not 18.3°C as default). The climate data are from the NEX-GDDP-CMIP6 dataset and using ensemble mean of 33 models in SSP126 SSP245 SSP370 and SSP585 scenarios. The projection is started from 2015.
